descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes lose 5-3 to Humboldt Broncos in overtime in Game 1 of Centennial Cup Western final.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes fell 5-3 to the Humboldt Broncos in overtime on April 21, 1987, in Game 1 of the best-of-seven Centennial Cup Western Canada junior hockey final. Curtis Chamberlain scored three goals including the overtime winner for Saskatchewan's champion Broncos. Richmond led 2-1 after two periods but the teams tied 3-3 in regulation, with Sockeyes scorers Bryan Moller, Matt Hervey, and Jason Phillips.
